[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000 a
1 0000000 a
2 0000000 a
3 0000000 a
4 1010000 2
5 0000000 a
6 0110100 3
7 1010000 2

01 10 0000010 1
12 21 0100000 1
23 32 1010100 3
34 43 0010100 2
45 54 0110000 2
56 65 1110001 4
67 76 0110011 4
70 07 0010010 2

02 20 1010000 2 match 4 7
13 31 0000000 a match 0 1 2 3 5
24 42 0110100 3 match 6
35 53 1010000 2 match 4 7
46 64 0110110 4
57 75 0110001 3
60 06 1010010 3
71 17 0100011 3

03 30 1010000 2 match 4 7
14 41 0100010 2
25 52 1110000 3
36 63 1010100 3
47 74 0110010 3
50 05 1010000 2 match 4 7
61 16 0100011 3
72 27 0110000 2

04 40 0010010 2
15 51 0100001 2
26 62 1110100 4
37 73 0010000 1
